tools.name: cache_get
tools.description:
Get a value from the cache.

    Args:
        key: The key to retrieve

    Returns:
        Value or error message

tools.name: cache_gets
tools.description:
Get a value and its CAS token from the cache.

    Args:
        key: The key to retrieve

    Returns:
        Value and CAS token or error message

tools.name: cache_get_many
tools.description:
Get multiple values from the cache.

    Args:
        keys: List of keys to retrieve

    Returns:
        Dictionary of key-value pairs or error message

tools.name: cache_get_multi
tools.description:
Get multiple values from the cache (alias for get_many).

    Args:
        keys: List of keys to retrieve

    Returns:
        Dictionary of key-value pairs or error message

tools.name: cache_set
tools.description:
Set a value in the cache.

    Args:
        key: The key to set
        value: The value to store
        expire: Optional expiration time in seconds

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_cas
tools.description:
Set a value using CAS (Check And Set).

    Args:
        key: The key to set
        value: The value to store
        cas: CAS token from gets()
        expire: Optional expiration time in seconds

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_set_many
tools.description:
Set multiple values in the cache.

    Args:
        mapping: Dictionary of key-value pairs
        expire: Optional expiration time in seconds

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_set_multi
tools.description:
Set multiple values in the cache (alias for set_many).

    Args:
        mapping: Dictionary of key-value pairs
        expire: Optional expiration time in seconds

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_add
tools.description:
Add a value to the cache only if the key doesn't exist.

    Args:
        key: The key to add
        value: The value to store
        expire: Optional expiration time in seconds

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_replace
tools.description:
Replace a value in the cache only if the key exists.

    Args:
        key: The key to replace
        value: The new value
        expire: Optional expiration time in seconds

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_append
tools.description:
Append a string to an existing value.

    Args:
        key: The key to append to
        value: String to append

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_prepend
tools.description:
Prepend a string to an existing value.

    Args:
        key: The key to prepend to
        value: String to prepend

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_delete
tools.description:
Delete a value from the cache.

    Args:
        key: The key to delete

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_delete_many
tools.description:
Delete multiple values from the cache.

    Args:
        keys: List of keys to delete

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_delete_multi
tools.description:
Delete multiple values from the cache (alias for delete_many).

    Args:
        keys: List of keys to delete

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_incr
tools.description:
Increment a counter in the cache.

    Args:
        key: The key to increment
        value: Amount to increment by (default 1)

    Returns:
        New value or error message

tools.name: cache_decr
tools.description:
Decrement a counter in the cache.

    Args:
        key: The key to decrement
        value: Amount to decrement by (default 1)

    Returns:
        New value or error message

tools.name: cache_touch
tools.description:
Update the expiration time for a key.

    Args:
        key: The key to update
        expire: New expiration time in seconds

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_stats
tools.description:
Get cache statistics.

    Args:
        args: Optional list of stats to retrieve

    Returns:
        Statistics or error message

tools.name: cache_flush_all
tools.description:
Flush all cache entries.

    Args:
        delay: Optional delay in seconds before flushing

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_quit
tools.description:
Close the connection to the cache server.

    Returns:
        Success message or error message

tools.name: cache_version
tools.description:
Get the version of the cache server.

    Returns:
        Version string or error message
